title: spiraea × oxyodon
intro: Spiraea × oxyodon, also known as Double Flower Rose Spiraea, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Spiraea × oxyodon include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
